```output
JobID           JobName  Partition    Account  AllocCPUS      State ExitCode 
------------ ---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- ---------- -------- 
19526917     interacti+     normal       whep          0 CANCELLED+      0:0 
19526933     interacti+     normal       whep          0 CANCELLED+      0:0 
19526967     interacti+     normal       whep          1  COMPLETED      0:0 
19526967.ex+     extern                  whep          1  COMPLETED      0:0
```
